description: Round toed, navy blue clogs with slip-on stylingFully molded Croslite™ material for lightweight cushioning and comfortCroslite™ upper with branding and cut-out detail on the forefoot, backfoot strap with branding at the connecting pointsCroslite™ footbed, textured with branding at the heel regionThick midsole with branding at the backNon-marking Croslite™ material outsoleWarranty: 3 months against manufacturing defects
